# Attribution — Staxel Voxel Female

This third-party reference asset was provided for Starlight Ridge voxel style and generator reference intake.

Attribution text:

"Staxel Voxel Female" (https://skfb.ly/PBsF) by andruha1801 is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

## Project use

- Intended use in this repo: reference-only / generator calibration / external tool pipeline testing.
- Do not treat this as a final Starlight Ridge player or NPC base.
- Do not bake this directly into shipped content unless the attribution is carried into the shipped credits/documentation.
- Derived or modified versions must retain attribution and indicate that changes were made.
- Final Starlight Ridge character bodies should remain original project assets generated/refined from project-owned standards.

## Local files

- staxel_voxel_female.glb
- staxel-voxel-female.zip
